title: corethrogyne filaginifolia var. brevicula
intro: Corethrogyne filaginifolia var. brevicula, also known as a variant of the California goldenbush, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Corethrogyne filaginifolia var. brevicula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
